summary: Derive OIDC authorization and token URLs from cfg.BaseURL (or cfg.OIDCIssuer override) instead of hardcoding localhost:9001.
reason: Generator emits hardcoded http://localhost:9001 OIDC URLs in auth.go (lines 70 + 129) and client.go (line 375), bypassing cfg.BaseURL entirely. `auth login` and automatic token refresh are broken for any non-local Etherpad deployment. Greptile flagged this as P1 on review of mvanhorn/printing-press-library#396.
validated_outcome: Adds cfg.OIDCIssuer field + ETHERPAD_OIDC_ISSUER env override + AuthURL()/TokenURL() helpers that derive scheme://host from BaseURL. auth login + refresh now work against any Etherpad deployment whose OIDC provider is at the same host, with explicit override for separate-host providers. localhost:9001 fallback preserved only when BaseURL is unset or unparseable.
upstream_issue: TODO: file on mvanhorn/cli-printing-press — generator template should derive OIDC URLs from BaseURL by default.
